title: 'passes/pmgen/xilinx_srl_pm.h' file not found
body:
I downloaded the current Yosys onto my Mac, ran the brew step which worked:

```
satnam-macbookpro3:yosys satnam$ brew tap Homebrew/bundle && brew bundle
Using bison
Using flex
Using gawk
Using libffi
Using git
Using graphviz
Using pkg-config
Using python3
Using tcl-tk
Homebrew Bundle complete! 9 Brewfile dependencies now installed.
```

and then typed `make` which failed with:

```
[ 47%] Building passes/pmgen/test_pmgen.o
passes/pmgen/test_pmgen.cc:31:10: fatal error: 'passes/pmgen/xilinx_srl_pm.h' file not found
#include "passes/pmgen/xilinx_srl_pm.h"
         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
make: *** [passes/pmgen/test_pmgen.o] Error 1
satnam-macbookpro3:yosys satnam$ find . -name xilinx_srl_pm.h
```

Git log:

```
satnam-macbookpro3:yosys satnam$ git log
commit 999fb33fd0e6d1714bc61f7e50a5c16e0da9d4ab (HEAD -> master, origin/master, origin/HEAD)
Merge: eef06761 6a111ad3
Author: Eddie Hung <eddie@fpgeh.com>
Date:   Fri Aug 30 12:27:09 2019 -0700

    Merge pull request #1340 from YosysHQ/eddie/abc_no_clean

    abc9 to not call "clean" at end of run (often called outside)
```
code_blocks:

1 error generated.
